Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court'S Order Re: Plaintiff'S Application For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHNNY METHENY, 1853 UNION ENTERTAINMENT LLC Motion For Reconsideration Of This Court'S Order Re: Plaintiff'S Application For Right To Attach Order;

is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden under CCP 1008 to present any new facts, law or circumstances that could not have been addressed at the original hearing. Additionally, the motion was supported by evidence that included lease addendum signed by Mr. Metheny as "guarantor" and containing a personal guarantee clause referring to Exhibit A, "incorporated herein." Any issues regarding the purportedly missing signature and/or indicia of guarantee having been executed, could have been and should have been addressed in the fully briefed motion or at the hearing.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS' APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER

Appearances: Lauren Jones of Kronick Moskovitz Tiedemann & Girard (916.321.4500) for plaintiffs and moving parties; David Jordan of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (415.875.3323) for defendants and responding parties.

The court rules on plaintiffs' objections to evidence submitted by defendants. Counsel present arguments on the motion, and the court takes the matter under submission. The court will issue an order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
